gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/350)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/350)
text: هُمَا سَأَلَا أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَمَّا قَتَلَ الْمِعْرَاضُ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ إِذَا كَانَ هُوَ مِرْمَاتَكَ أَوْ صَنَعْتَهُ لِذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Aban, from Zurara, and Ismail Al Ju’fy,
(It has been narrated) both asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about what the blunt weapon kills’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem when it was hit by you or you made it for that’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Aban from Zurarah and ’Isma‘il al-Ju‘fiy who has said the following: “Zurarah and ’Isma’il al-Ju‘fiy had asked abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the prey which is killed by flareless arrow. He (the Imam) said, ’It is not unlawful if it is what you have shot and it is what you have made for it.’”
